---
title: Self-Directed Internet Learning
---

```{=html}
<hr style="height: 3px; border: none; color: white; font-weight: bold;">

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 20px;">
  <div style="flex: 1;">
    <h5> Data science with R </h5>
    <ul style="color: white; font-size: 16px;"> <!-- Font size set to 16px -->
      <li>Fundamentals of R programming</li>
      <li>Data manipulation with dplyr and tidyr</li>
      <li>Data visualization using ggplot2</li>
      <li>Statistical analysis and hypothesis testing</li>
      <li>Machine learning with R</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div style="flex: 1; text-align: right;">
    <img src="files/certificates/data_scientist_with_r.jpg" style="width: 400px;">
  </div>
</div>
<hr style="color: white;"> <!-- Horizontal line -->

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 20px;">
  <div style="flex: 1;">
    <h5> SAS programming </h5>
    <ul style="color: white; font-size: 16px;"> <!-- Font size set to 16px -->
      <li>SAS function, tables, Schemas</li>
      <li>Data cleaning and analysis with SAS</li>
      <li>Statistical analysis with SAS procedures</li>
      <li>Creation of reports and graphics</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div style="flex: 1; text-align: right;">
    <img src="files/certificates/sas.jpg" style="width: 400px;">
  </div>
</div>
<hr style="color: white;"> <!-- Horizontal line -->

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 20px;">
  <div style="flex: 1;">
    <h5> Concepts on Big data </h5>
    <ul style="color: white; font-size: 16px;"> <!-- Font size set to 16px -->
      <li>Conceptual understanding of Big Data</li>
      <li>Big Data technologies and ecosystems</li>
      <li>Data processing and storage techniques</li>
      <li>Big Data analytics and applications</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div style="flex: 1; text-align: right;">
    <img src="files/certificates/intro_to_bigdata.jpg" style="width: 400px;">
  </div>
</div>
<hr style="color: white;"> <!-- Horizontal line -->

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 20px;">
  <div style="flex: 1;">
    <h5> Big Data Modelling, Map-reduce</h5>
    <ul style="color: white; font-size: 16px;"> <!-- Font size set to 16px -->
      <li>Understanding of Big Data modeling techniques</li>
      <li>Application of predictive analytics in Big Data</li>
      <li>Hands-on experience with Hadoop</li>
      <li>Designing and implementing Big Data solutions</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div style="flex: 1; text-align: right;">
    <img src="files/certificates/big_data_modeling.jpg" style="width: 400px;">
  </div>
</div>
<hr style="color: white;"> <!-- Horizontal line -->

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 20px;">
  <div style="flex: 1;">
    <h5> Derivates and integrals for ML</h5>
    <ul style="color: white; font-size: 16px;"> <!-- Font size set to 16px -->
      <li>Functions of several variables</li>
      <li>Partial derivatives and gradients</li>
      <li>Double and triple integrals</li>
      <li>Vector calculus</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div style="flex: 1; text-align: right;">
    <img src="files/certificates/multivariate_calculus_page.jpg" style="width: 400px;">
  </div>
</div>
<hr style="color: white;"> <!-- Horizontal line -->

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 20px;">
  <div style="flex: 1;">
    <h5> Vector application in ML </h5>
    <ul style="color: white; font-size: 16px;"> <!-- Font size set to 16px -->
      <li>Systems of linear equations</li>
      <li>Matrix operations and properties</li>
      <li>Eigenvalues and eigenvectors</li>
      <li>Vector spaces and subspaces</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div style="flex: 1; text-align: right;">
    <img src="files/certificates/linear_algebra_page.jpg" style="width: 400px;">
  </div>
</div>
```
